tree.name: Clint Capela
tree.tradeDescription: Part of historic 7-team trade: Capela signed new deal facilitated as sign-and-trade from Atlanta. Rockets sent David Roddy, a 2031 2nd round pick swap and cash to Hawks.
tree.note: Swiss center returns to Houston; drafted by HOU in 2014, spent first 6 seasons here before 5 years in Atlanta

assetsGivenUp.name: David Roddy
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed to two-way contract after being waived; sent to ATL in trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 2nd Round Pick Swap
assetsGivenUp.note: Second-round pick swap sent to Atlanta

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to Atlanta to facilitate sign-and-trade
